svg.text: A2A Protocol — Interaction & Task Lifecycle Flow
Step-by-step: discover agents, authenticate, delegate tasks, receive results via streaming or polling
Find the right agent for the job
Fetch AgentCard from the remote agent endpoint
Establish trust with the remote agent
Delegate work to the remote agent
For clients that don't support SSE
Response: { task: { id, status, history[ ], artifacts[ ] } }
Deliver results back to the user
Extract artifact content, display formatted response
Discover (1-5) → Authenticate (6-7) → Create Task (8-10) → Stream or Poll (11a/11b) → Deliver Artifacts (12-14)
